title: Garlicky Aerated Dutch Galangal Pasta
description: A unique twist on traditional pasta featuring the aromatic flavors of galangal and a paleo-friendly pasta water emulsion. Cooked to perfection on a Binchotan grill for a smoky depth of flavor.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a separate saucepan, combine grated carrot, ginger, and chicken broth. Bring to a simmer over medium heat and cook until the carrot is tender, about 5 minutes.
Grill the binchotan charcoal in a grill or grill pan until smoky and well charred, about 10 minutes.
Add garlic oil to the saucepan with the carrot mixture and stir to combine.
In a blender or food processor, combine the pasta water, lemon juice, and garlic oil mixture. Blend until the mixture becomes aerated and frothy, about 5 minutes.
To assemble the dish, combine cooked pasta, sauce, and charred galangal in a serving dish. Garnish with toasted almonds and fresh parsley
